# xenserver_import_raw_vdi (Resource)

import Raw/VHD vdi resource.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "xenserver_import_raw_vdi" "vdi" {
  raw_vdi_path = "/home/ubuntu/livecd.ubuntu-cpc.azure.vhd"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `raw_vdi_path` (String) The path to the raw VDI file.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The test ID of the virtual disk image.
- `uuid` (String) The UUID of the virtual disk image.
